title: Interface visor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Interface_Visor.png|thumb|right|200px|[[Carth Onasi]] wearing an interface visor]]
An '''interface visor''' combined mental and visual interfaces to aid in the analysis of electronic systems common to security, demolitions, and general computing functions.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-07-XX -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
*<!-- 2008-08-19 -->''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''
